=== Bolzano.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 10/30/03, Bolzano, Italy, Palaonda, 2CDR

Great sound

Cd>EAC>wav> FlacFrontend> Flac>MakeTorrent >Dime


pop at d1t1 0:00

CD1
1 intro 2 To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano), 3 It's All Over Now,
Baby Blue, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel, Freddy on
electric guitar, Tony on electric bass), 4 Cry A While (Bob on piano),
5 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp,
Larry on cittern), 6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic)
(Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 7 Watching The River Flow (Bob on
piano), 8 Can't Wait (Bob on piano), 9 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on
piano),

CD2
1 Love Minus Zero/No Limit (acoustic) (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on
pedal steel), 2 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 3 Every
Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano and harp), 4 Honest With Me (Bob on
piano), 5 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic) (Bob on
piano), 6 Summer Days (Bob on piano), 7 (encore), 8 Cat's In The Well
(Bob on piano), 9 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 10 All Along
The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp)
